title: 6 Pack 16 oz Overnight Oats Jar, Glass Jars with Lids Mason Jar for Overnight Oats Yoghurt Pots, Portable Breakfast Container Reusable with Screw Lid for Salad Fruit Pudding Chutney Jam Spice
features: Eco-Friendly & Durable- These overnight oats jar are crafted from high-quality thickened borosilicate glass paired with food-grade PP lids. Reusable material, you can feel good about making a sustainable choice for your daily food storage needs while enjoying the durability and safety of glass. The transparent design allows easy visibility of contents, perfect for storing a variety of items.

Excellent Sealing & Portability- The overnight oats jar feature an excellent sealing that effectively prevents leaks. This makes them ideal for on - the - go use, whether you're taking your breakfast to work, going on a picnic, or storing food in the fridge overnight. The food remains fresh and secure, so you don't have to worry about any spills or messes, ensuring a hassle free experience.

Wide Mouth Design- The wide mouth design not only makes it easy to fill and scoop out food but also simplifies the cleaning process. Whether it's breakfast staples (oats, yogurt, pudding), liquids (jam, hot sauce), or dry goods (coffee beans, spices, nuts), these overnight oats jar with lids are your go - to solution.

Labels for Classification and Tagging- Each overnight oats jar comes with a DIY label, allowing you to easily categorize and mark your stored items, Label different oat flavors, sauces, or snacks for quick identification. Ideal for home pantries, office kitchens, or meal-prepping enthusiasts seeking clutter-free storage.

Glass Jars Set- Include 6 pcs overnight oats jar with a 16oz/480ml capacity and 8 tags. We're committed to providing excellent service, so if you have any questions or concerns about these overnight oats jars, our support team is ready to assist you.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash only. Dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave, oven, or freezer.
